reviews.review_msg: He is not meant to be a teacher. 2 days before the midterm I went to his office hours and he wasnt there, so I emailed him, and he replied to me 20 mins before the start of the midterm saying he's in his office now (literally). Although he does explain concepts clearly, the exams are hard.

John is a very engaging prof. He brings in real world examples to demonstrate examples. Very approachable, and his tests are fair provided you read the text and attend lectures. Lots of vital material presented that is relevant to post university endeavors.
